verdict.answer_first: Both answer immediately; B opens with 'Use a managed provider, not your own.'
verdict.decisiveness: B commits more concretely with 'start with Clerk or Supabase Auth depending on whether you value speed-to-ship... or low cost and data ownership' while A surveys more options.
verdict.actionability: B is easier to act on right now because it narrows the next choice to Clerk vs Supabase instead of a broader provider matrix.
